title: Tangy Toasted Chinese Tofu Noodles
description: A satvik-friendly Yunnan dish featuring green salsa and caramelized tofu, this recipe is perfect for meal prep. It has a bitter and shaggy texture from the toasted noodles and green salsa.
instructions: Cook the noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
Cut the tofu into small cubes and toast in a pan with sesame oil until golden brown.
Add the grated ginger and minced garlic to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Add the green salsa to the pan and stir to combine with the tofu and ginger mixture.
Add the cooked noodles to the pan and toss to combine with the green salsa mixture.
Add the soy sauce, salt, and pepper to the pan and stir to combine.
Transfer the noodle mixture to a bowl and top with chopped scallions.
Let it cool and refrigerate for up to 3 days for meal prep.
